prior to or within 30 days after the start of the home health care, was related to the 
primary reason the patient requires home health services, and was performed by a 
physician or non-physician practitioner. The certifying physician or allowed practitioner 
must also document the date of the encounter. 

Example Certification Statement: 
 I certify that this patient is confined to his/her home and needs intermittent skilled 
nursing care, physical therapy and/or speech
